description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a mix of concrete and wood-textured exterior surfaces. The front includes a double garage and a main entrance, both set into a rectangular facade with large windows. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, partially covered by a pergola for shade. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large picture windows overlooking the backyard and pool area. The house sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, bordered by a paved driveway leading to the garage. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, concrete and wood exterior, double garage, and a backyard pool with a pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, and a mix of concrete and wood textures.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, side windows, and the transition from the garage to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the wooden deck, swimming pool, pergola, and large picture windows overlooking the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, pool, and the flat roof structure from the back corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a flat overhang, adjacent to a double garage, minimalistic and clean lines
